title: Ubiquiti Wave-AP-Micro, UISP Wave Access Point Micro
description: The Wave Access Point Micro is a 60GHz point-to-multipoint (PtMP) transmitter unit with built-in 5 GHz backup (WiFi 6 - 802.11ax) from Ubiquiti with a range up to 6km against the Wave LR or 4km against the smaller Wave Nano unit and is ideal for ISPs. The very discreet device is also equipped with integrated GPS , Bluetooth for simple initial setup from a mobile via the UISP mobile application , a 2.5 Gigabit LAN port with support for power via PoE - 24 and 48V DC. The device only supports… Compact dimensions - 284 Ã 156 Ã 76 mm 60 GHz spectrum with low interference - 57 to 71 GHz Built-in 60 GHz antenna with 20 dBi gain and 90 ° / 7 ° radiation angle Range up to 6 km - depends on the regulation in the country used , up to 15 clients support Throughput 5 Gbps (2.5 Gbps FD) Supports half channel width to achieve longer distance or better availability in bad weather Supported channels: 58320, 59400, 60480, 61560, 62640, 63720, 64800, 65880, 66960, 68040, 69120, 70200 MHz - depends on place of use 2.5 Gigabit LAN port with passive PoE support (24 or 48V DC) Built-in GPS Settings via web management and bluetooth - UISP mobile application Device Fine Tuning Holder PoE power adapter 48 V/0.65 A Power cord
